## Meeting Purpose

[Preliminary interview for Managing Editor role at growthx.ai with candidate Ehtisham Hussain.](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ehtisham has 13+ years of content industry experience, progressing from writer to leadership roles](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Diverse background: agency work (Logicals), in-house content marketing (Quickstart), and product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Strong adaptability: quick learning across industries, pivot from content to broader marketing functions](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Technical expertise: IT/tech education focus, exposure to AI integration in products](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)

## Topics

### Career Progression in Content Industry

  - [Started as writer in 2011/2012 at Logicals agency in Karachi, Pakistan](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Promoted to editor, then head of production (managed 60 writers, 12 editors)](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Agency primarily served US clients, produced high-volume 500-word blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Developed skill for rapid industry research and content production across diverse sectors](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Transition to In-House Content Marketing

  - [2017: Joined Quickstart as in-house Content Marketing Manager](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Quickstart: LMS company focused on IT/technical education](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Company undergoing major revival: new ownership, product reset with AI elements](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Initially sole marketing person, expanded role beyond content (email, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Expansion into Product Marketing

  - [Transitioned to Product Marketing Manager role at Quickstart](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Hired content team, oversaw multiple marketing channels](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Gained experience in broader marketing functions beyond content creation](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Technical and AI Exposure

  - [Worked with IT/technical education content at Quickstart](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Exposure to AI integration in product development during company revival](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

  - [Explore Ehtisham's experience with AI-driven content and marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Discuss specific managing editor responsibilities at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/vUTDyAtiQkkKYHz6Rm1BY8tDx7uA154y?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
